programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy, Rose and Blanche seek professional help when living with one another becomes unbearable.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose decides to move in with Buddy Rourke, one of her deceased husband's former buddies.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche agrees to pose in the nude for a suave European sculptor.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche reunites with her daughter Rebecca after a four-year estrangement; Blanche wants to defend her from an abusive boyfriend.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche and Rose despise one of Dorothy's friends, the novelist Barbara Thorndyke.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: A trip to Hollywood to compete on their favorite game show turns sour for the roommates.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy hocks an expensive ring to pay off the debt she and her ex-husband owe to the Internal Revenue Service.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy, Rose and Blanche seek professional help when living with one another becomes unbearable.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose decides to move in with Buddy Rourke, one of her deceased husband's former buddies.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Grandma makes plans to distribute her wealth after a friend leaves her $250.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The Walton family befriends a mail pilot forced down by engine trouble; Olivia feels depressed.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Kyra tells Reba and Brock that she is postponing college to tour with her band; Cheyenne and Van cannot agree on how to decorate their new house.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba drops by Cheyenne and Van's house unexpectedly; Barbra Jean has a meltdown during her weather report.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Van and Cheyenne must move back in with Reba after he starts a fire at their house; Barbra Jean considers a job offer.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba discovers that her husband is leaving her for his pregnant girlfriend and that her 17-year-old daughter is pregnant as well.

programme.title: Reba
programme.sub-title: The Honeymoon's Over or Now What?
programme.desc: Reba takes a stand when a pregnant Cheyenne is kicked out of high school but Van is allowed to stay to help the football team make the championships.

programme.title: Reba
programme.sub-title: Someone's at the Gyno With Reba
programme.desc: Reba discovers that her daughter's obstetrician will also be delivering the baby of her ex-husband's mistress.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Cheyenne tries to hide her morning sickness from Van; Reba's neighbor refuses to let her son sleep over.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: The football players think they're doomed when Cheyenne serves the wrong kind of potato salad at the traditional pregame dinner.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Sophia is a third wheel when Dorothy and her new boyfriend plan a trip without her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Sophia's new boyfriend Rocco robs a bank and makes her an unsuspecting accomplice.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose's boyfriend buys a boat and asks her to accompany him on a cruise around the world.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy's son Michael is getting married to an older woman, and the mothers of the bride and groom are concerned.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: The reaction of Logan's parents to Rory and Logan's relationship shocks Rory; when Sookie is placed on bed rest, Lorelai calls on Luke to serve as the interim chef at the Dragonfly Inn.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.sub-title: How Many Kropogs to Cape Cod?
programme.desc: Rory studies up on Logan's father (Gregg Henry) before beginning work for him as an intern; Lorelai sees a side of Logan that makes her worry about Rory's involvement with the Huntzberger family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Rory is stunned by the performance review she receives from Logan's father, Mitchum Huntzberger; Lorelai has mixed feelings when the travel article featuring the inn hits the stands.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love, Classified
programme.desc: Returning home after a long absence, a romance novelist reconnects with her children as they start to find their own paths to love.

programme.title: Sun, Sand & Romance
programme.desc: Kate and Eric head to Cancun for a vacation. Upon arrival, Eric leaves Kate to her own devices time and again to pursue an opportunity. Luckily, Shep, the resort's activities director, is more than willing to help fill her time with adventure.

programme.title: Come Fly With Me
programme.desc: The daughter of an Air Force captain and the daughter of a widower hatch a plan to bring their single parents together.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Hannah Swensen is thrilled when she is chosen as a guest for the first Eden Lake Dessert Bake-Off, but when fellow judge, coach Boyd Watson is found murdered, Hannah takes it upon herself to find the killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Sophia encourages Dorothy and Stan to pretend they are still married, at least until Sophia's clergyman brother leaves town.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The women reflect on their years spent together when Sophia announces she is going to live with her son.

programme.desc: The football players think they're doomed when Cheyenne serves the wrong kind of potato salad at the traditional pregame dinner.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba's ex-husband becomes jealous when she calls a plumber to fix a faucet; Cheyenne "moons" Van's teammates.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Kyra does not want to spend time with her father since it includes Barbra Jean; Cheyenne and Van plan to move out.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: When Van fails a history test due to the pressure of being a star football player, Reba steps in to tutor him.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba's best friend returns to Houston and uncovers a photograph that hints at infidelity early in Reba and Brock's marriage.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.sub-title: The Days and Nights of Sophia Petrillo
programme.desc: Sophia's roommates, bored with themselves, are unaware of her active daytime life.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche encounters a former schoolmate who is the only man to ever turn her down.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose competes for St. Olaf's Woman of the Year honors, with a little help of Blanche and Dorothy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Sophia cries foul after being hit with a fly ball at the stadium; Stan tries to sue the ballpark.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.sub-title: A House Is Not a Home
programme.desc: Lorelei is stunned to hear Rory's plans for the future and turns to Richard and Emily for help, but soon realizes that Luke is the only person she can trust.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: When word spreads that Lorelai was the one who proposed, Luke is embarrassed; Lorelai, still angry at Rory for dropping out, tells Emily and Richard that they can care for her now.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Rory begins to serve her community service working with a road crew; Lorelai and Luke debate fixing up the house or buying another.

programme.title: Feeling Butterflies
programme.desc: Emily's booming butterfly business delivers monarchs to a birthday party, where she meets Garrett, a single father. With help from Garrett and his daughter, her business soon begins to take flight.

programme.title: Love on the Danube: Love Song
programme.desc: A daughter traveling with her widowed mother and a son traveling with his widower father meet on a cruise; the two decide that their musical parents would make the perfect couple try to engineer a romance only to falling in love themselves.

programme.title: Once Upon a Holiday
programme.desc: When a royal princess runs away from her official obligations and duties, she starts to fall in love with a good Samaritan who is unaware of her real identity.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Christmas by Starlight
programme.desc: A lawyer makes a deal with the heir to a development firm to spare her family's restaurant from demolition. However, she must spend the week posing as the legal counsel his father is demanding he hire in the wake of some costly mistakes.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose's new boyfriend Mr. Terrific gets Dorothy a job, but her recommendations get him fired.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: In flashbacks, the housemates reminisce about Mother's Day celebrations.

programme.desc: A battle for the affections of a Cuban cigar mogul ignites a dispute between Blanche and Sophia.
